Home / Service Areas / Philadelphia

Remodeling contractor in Philadelphia, PA

Trusted local professionals serving Philadelphia and surrounding communities

Serving Philadelphia, PA

Power Construction USA - LLC is proud to serve the vibrant city of Philadelphia, PA, offering comprehensive remodeling services to homeowners and businesses alike. From historic row homes to modern condos, our team is equipped to handle any project, big or small. We understand the unique architectural landscape of Philadelphia and are committed to preserving its character while enhancing your living or working space. We offer a wide range of remodeling services in Philadelphia, including kitchen and bathroom renovations, basement finishing, additions, and whole-house remodels. Our experienced team will work closely with you to bring your vision to life, ensuring your project is completed on time and within budget. We pride ourselves on our quality workmanship and attention to detail, ensuring your complete satisfaction.

Philadelphia is known for its rich history, diverse neighborhoods, and passionate sports fans. Our team understands the local building codes and permit requirements, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free remodeling experience.
